dreams.text: So I remember only fragments of my dream I sort of remember my grandma Being taken care of and feeling like she's not properly being taken care of by The family members, Including my older brother and myself. She became very mistrusting And I remember trying to guide her somewhere thinking it's for her good. But she kept being angry at me. And I remember also a moment Where Her mind was put into a Body of a cat And I was worried for her And how  Helpless she might feel in this outrageous and out there situation. Yet all the other family members were going along with it And under Another time Fragment I remember is Some of my dad's friend Talking to me And lecturing me a bit condescendingly Like he's talking from above to me as if I don't know any better about life and am Naïve.

So I remember only fragments of my dream I remember My friend onion Being Surprised for how long I've had that dynamic With this Woman And we were in a classroom setting And he got mad And I was like it was just once but it's not fair For you to be mad Like We don't have any kind of exclusivity, but he came out with this how he always wanted to have a second wife and for me to be that second wife, and this was as if thought cheating…And I remember that the teacher jumping in and commenting  how Things like that are silly especially if there's no love involved and It will be even then but like this just makes it disgusting and gross kind of thing, And like she was like you're so young and like for people would like her Or something like that And I was like I'm 28 teacher She was like oh yeah there was some chaos then And yeah separately and I remember was like painting on And he had some body dysmorphia or something like he didn't like His belly button was her belly was too White or something like that so I thought about like making a optical illusion or something like that with the painting on him so that It will look slimmer And I remember some kind of explanation of the painting for the day having to do with like colors and I was thinking about I had two different ideas of how to paint or body And I started with some underlying colors but then I was like OK I can do something cool and open With the themes of sea and sky or I can do something like a Armored or kind of thing some kind of interesting texture and I remember putting on the first layers and thinking of these layers but It's not gonna look anything like That when it's finished because this is the underlying warm layer that help me Make the cool colors pop up much better when I paint them on him And Completely separate layer was like something about Suicide Like there was Me and someone else And someone else decided that they were gonna go But I don't quite remember because also I had these like some kind of planetary scale feeling like there were the planet or connected to the planet and that they had a reason to go but then when I followed him I made that choice there was someone Feelings of like OK you've made your own choice And I was like People are sad or something like that around me and I'm just watching things As they drift away from me But it was also like not necessarily like I was

I just remember a fragment of last nights dream, I was on a ski lift going up the mountain and I dropped on of my skies along the way, and had to go and get it.. and I remember two guys on the lift next to me being shocked and commenting.

I just remembered tiny fragments of my dream I remember ski lifts and I remember some deep dives Into some caves and  I remember going through a ski route where the snow was too thick , I remember My dad and my older brother being there …

OK so I remember some fragments for my dream I remember Sort of like a excursion Type of event with high school I remember the involvement of my Primary teacher Also my mom for some reason I felt her presence And I remember me forgetting my finished passport And realizing I have my old identity Still in my Serbian passport Then some other fragments I remember or kind of like Scenes and moments of Homelander I remember going In the left downstairs And I remember also some kind of Moment being put into Self isolation And I remember the presence of two ladies with a bit of different attitudes Being present There and interacting

So I just woke up and I remember small fragments of my dream Running Through a Market Somewhere And the police officer Stopping me asking me where I'm running to And then I stop I start telling him What I do for work and such I start chatting a bit Being like I have nothing too hide actually love my work, he escorted me to my work . And I told him I graduated and work And also Then when I arrived I was actually a student in high school class I was somewhat late And the teacher was bringing us back The Math Test. I got the second lowest grade,  My friend Ognjen He Looked at me disappointed like oh did you get the worst grade And I was like heck no I got the second lowest grade Showing two fingers at him, a second old friend was present Witnessing that

I remember some fragments from my dream like The famous tennis player Novak Djokovic Landing and crashing In a plane /Helicopter for one person And my older brother And me And my dad and some people will be there It was somewhere in the countryside of Serbia Everybody was freaking out Meanwhile I had also something else going on And there are some tension and a pressure to do things quickly take a bus and go somewhere An under separate fragment I remember having some kind of Test Like being in a high school classroom and there being a test.  I remember fumbling around with all different papers and Being really scared of getting the low grade and kind of feeling like that's what's going to happen And I was fumbling a lot with all the different papers and materials that I had As I was freaking out About the Low grade I'm about to get But also thinking how unfair it was to be tested in that moment because I also had so many other things going on the previous days.  
I think I also remember talking to my older brother in my dreams about some past hurts and trauma between us.

I remember fragments for my dream About high school and failing some tests and Bing shamed by the teachers themselves Also I remember this was the first dream I had where I dreamed someone had walked into my room I thought that I was like falling asleep but I tried to stop the person, I couldn’t move my body but I finally managed and I jolted My arm and grabbed them as they sat on the bed next to me And I squeeze them tight at first I thought it was like some imposter but then it was like maybe it's a warm presence Maybe I can relax in the lap of this person and then I realized it was a dream, and no one had actually walked into my room

I just remember Moment Like flying Over Building Or house with some Important thing to do And also having like someone My mother or someone else look over that task And I remember An expectation of some kind of explosion or something , people Hiding in trams And then Being on some kind of voice chat Like everybody on the tram had  Expectation everybody he on it, and someone told me since  I wasn’t It will be OK , I will be transported home and I did get transported into finland but a bit north and not quite where mg home town was , (remember world of warcraft type map and hearthstone )
a little while ago I took a nap and had a nightmare that Luka and I were arguing and he used chat gpt to argue his side for him and he was sending  me the chat gpt answers 😂

So I remember this dream where Me and a community of people face a scenario  where bombs are about to be falling on our city we are about to be attacked by some natzi type military and then we did end up getting rounded up In a Building or something like that perhaps  a school or something And basically They were Trying to Select an decided Which one of us Are gonna get killed, And we were going through a different checkpoints Being asked different questions and stuff like that And I sort of remember An older person there On the side of the Nazis now He Was before a community member But Now found himself on the other side serving the natzis And he abused his power by Raping me now , we had seemingly  know before and he has had his eye on me for some time And then he was shocked himself and remorseful for what he had done, And was begging for forgiveness from me In the bathroom, and I told him I would forgive him If he help me get out of this alive, That he owes me that much , that I need him to calm down and stop panicking and crying for what he did. But then once I left him and continued on to the next checkpoint I was asked by a woman Nazi that was kinda pretty where was I?  and I didn't have a good lie so I told the truth that I was in the bathroom with this guy Then I got question of why I was a In the bathroom with him And I'm not sure what I said but I remember Being selected And put into the section of people possibly to get murdered and killed And going along in a different group now, It's kind of fuzzy what happens after that Maybe I tried to Escape or continue on trying to find some kind of a solution.

Another dream that I remember that I think was A separate dream but maybe somehow connected to the last one Was that In a small town I was writing My mom's car even though I don't have a drivers license But I had Some urgent reasons And that I was doing it for And then I remember stopping somewhere next to this old house Jumping or defense And sitting on a spot pulling out my phone and trying to get something Done At the family whose property is was where I kind of stopped And said they came out the whole family mom died and Two kids Yeah I was Half naked Almost just like In my underwear And I was kind of turning between Shane and fear Trying to cover myself up while at the same time getting done what I was trying to get done And I remember a family Their approach was also a bit Flipping as I could gather that they were at the same time Worried And Potentially also Asking questions that could implicate me And bring out some kind of guilt for me And I remember also being scared that I was exposed Like that in front of children. 

And another separate fragment I remember was that in a classroom I had given children copies of my art book only later realising that I had a couple of pages with shibari paintings included in the boo, and I got scared how that would be interpreted by kids and by others that I had gifted kids books that contain such pages.

Some fragments I remember are , 2 boy kids with guns sitting down Inside of a mall hall type space, one of the kids flashes the gone at me and thretens me, another black woman comes and gets up and personal with then saying how the guns don’t scare her and started handling the other kid, and trying to get his gun from him, I remember shots being fired and the first kid then pointing a gun at me and shooting, and at that point I was like I am not playing with these kida and shoot myself tthe kidn and landed my one or two shoots in his chest area . 


Then another small fragment I remember snowboarding around a slope getting to the escalator as my old grandma was vocally present and nararating some of her thoughts on the past and also some old successesful grandpa was narrating as well telling ubout life and his sucess , how to sucseed, what is importan and such , they were just voices to me , and I was listening in thinking how a lot of this isn’t relevant to me since my life is so different.

I remember fragments for my dream Sort of being in a zoo type Place And I remember being near cliff Or like a Some kind of drop in the Enclosure, Certain narrow and Cubically formed Form form was like the valley Or the drop And I remember Confronting a Orochimaru type Figure And being like I didn't fall like you said And then he was like look again and I went back to see that I did indeed fall of the cliff and my body was there instead of up talking with hims and at the bottom the I think I didn’t  die it was sort of imbigues for moments but then I was trying to manage Lions and tigers and such Wild predatory animals And at first they were Not attacking me then maybe they were, I Accidentally got peanut butter on my leg and borke it? and then being scared that is definitely gonna attract Them to try and eat mecI try climbing out of the hole and getting into different places so they enclosure , some kind of terrace now And I remember Fighting for my life , and the lion jumping up to where I was and I had thrown it back down  and killed it but then I was expecting the respawn of the 
Lion/ tiger and was like than I am fucked.


Then another dream and fragment I remember is Think I bought something but then still having th safety beeper from the store and actually I think I had stolen it But then got an email that I must return Beeper beeper To the store By this date or I will be in trouble, i was like ohh damn I am fucked, was also zooming out and realising I had a big wifi tower or distributor right in my neighbourhood.

Thems of concentration camp, time passing by , people and animals deadC left behind, my older brother and a new wife who was my friend and suddenly became my sister in law, my artworks or postcards i gave her, me asking my older brother how he is doing , him answering well, its been tough this one thing going on and then this with me but if he wakes up on time or something like that he said he feels he can do something about it,  I was in a strange spot then felt guilty for having pushed some burden on him, but was also compering my waking ip to his, and something about it , how I needed to wake up at the just right time and what happenes if I wake up 40 minutes late , also remember  checking my emails to see if Mistress has sent me a email, and then she sort of did, but It was different than I expected, i got back bunch od photographs and now some thing she wrote for me on them , and gave me a task . I was relieved to find what she intended for me even though it wasn’t what I first expected.
